---
description: DEFUN with long lambda list breaks differently at margin 40
column: 0
right-margin: [nil, 40]
---
(defun compute-discount (unit-price discount-rate) (* unit-price (- 1.0 discount-rate)))
---
(defun compute-discount (unit-price discount-rate)
  (* unit-price (- 1.0 discount-rate)))
---
(defun compute-discount
    (unit-price discount-rate)
  (* unit-price (- 1.0 discount-rate)))
---
